name: PCC AP Ageing
_comment: TODO: Group By on due_date gives day-level granularity. For 0-30/31-60/61-90/90+ bucket grouping, a custom field 'ap_ageing_bucket' should be computed on Purchase Invoice via a scheduled script, then group_by_based_on updated to that field. Alternatively, replace this chart with a Report-type chart backed by pepl_open_po_ageing report in Sprint 1.5.
